name: CROSS_ASSIGNEE_TOP_BY_TARGET
description: Top assignees by patent count for a given target symbol.
cypher:
MATCH (t:Target {symbol:$target})<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a:Assignee)
RETURN a.name AS assignee, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
ORDER BY patent_count DESC, assignee
LIMIT 10;

examples: 哪个企业在 PD-1 相关专利申请最多？
